SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff George Ballard Company, a corporation.
Alan D. Fong, Senior Collective Reporsentative Credit and Collections Service for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Robert K. Bonner was filed today, May 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed February 29, 2008.
Cross-Complaint filed June 4, 2008 by Cross-Complainants Bonner Metal Processing, LLC a limited liability company and Robert K. Bonner, against cross-defendants Kiet Nguyen, Renato Garofanl, Long Hoang, and Does 51 through 100, inclusive, was dismissed today, May 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff George Ballard Company, a corporation, and against defendant Bonner Metal Processing, LLC., a limited liability company as follows:

Principal - $114,422.64.
Interest - $22,528.80.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $1,032.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $137,983.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
